title: castilleja lineata
intro: Castilleja lineata, also known as Indian paintbrush, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its bright red and yellow flowers resembling a paintbrush. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant properties. The plant's medicinal properties also include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as reduce fever. Castilleja lineata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used to harness its health benefits.
